MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Leticia Perez. Mia S. Blackler, Esq. represented Plaintiff, America California Bank. Robert Koch, Sr.ice President/Chief Credit Officer, was sworn and examined on behalf of the Plantifff.
